a6526f45-5f80-4bfe-ab31-c7dd2c8a470b.__data__:
{"id_":"a6526f45-5f80-4bfe-ab31-c7dd2c8a470b","metadata":{"file_name":"certificate from pi.pdf","project_id":"cmp8o7kwf000414gy457ob6ea"},"excludedEmbedMetadataKeys":[],"excludedLlmMetadataKeys":[],"relationships":{},"text":"Certificate from the Investigator
Project Title:
It is certified that
1. The same project proposal has not been submitted elsewhere for financial support.
2. We/I undertake that spare time on equipment procured in the project will be made available to
other users.
3. We/I agree to submit a certificate from Institutional Biosafety Committee, if the project involves
the utilization of genetically engineered organisms. We/I also declare that while conducting
experiments, the Biosafety Guidelines of Department of Biotechnology, Department of Health
Research, GOI would be followed in toto.
4. We/I agree to submit ethical clearance certificate from the concerned ethical committee, if the
project involves field trails/experiments/exchange of specimens, human & animal materials etc.
5. The research work proposed in the scheme/project does not in any way duplicate the work
already done or being carried out elsewhere on the subject.
6. We/I agree to abide by the terms and conditions of SERB grant.
Name and signature of Principal Investigator:
Date:
Place:
Name and signature of Co-PI (s) (if any):
Date:
Place:","textTemplate":"","metadataSeparator":"
","type":"DOCUMENT","hash":"2AlwdPBFYo0Ki/6JXQGmbEAvi8Y3/6HImw8TrNL+fSM="}

Project Title:
It is certified that
1. The same project proposal has not been submitted elsewhere for financial support.
2. We/I undertake that spare time on equipment procured in the project will be made available to
other users.
3. We/I agree to submit a certificate from Institutional Biosafety Committee, if the project involves
the utilization of genetically engineered organisms. We/I also declare that while conducting
experiments, the Biosafety Guidelines of Department of Biotechnology, Department of Health
Research, GOI would be followed in toto.
4. We/I agree to submit ethical clearance certificate from the concerned ethical committee, if the
project involves field trails/experiments/exchange of specimens, human & animal materials etc.
5. The research work proposed in the scheme/project does not in any way duplicate the work
already done or being carried out elsewhere on the subject.
6. We/I agree to abide by the terms and conditions of SERB grant.
